name: blaze-craft-marketplace
description: Two-skill engineering pack for Claude Code: api-craft (wire contract design) + mobile-craft (mobile orchestration and decision-making).

plugins.name: blaze-craft
plugins.description: API contract design and mobile orchestration. api-craft owns wire contracts (REST/GraphQL/RPC choice, versioning, error envelopes, pagination, idempotency, rate limiting, webhook contracts, SDK ergonomics, OpenAPI). mobile-craft owns mobile decision and orchestration (stack-choice phase, cross-runtime patterns, cross-store shipping discipline). Hands off platform implementation to ios-craft, react-native-foundations, expo, and fullstack-engineer.
